shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "git status --short && rg -n \"function parseDate|parseDate\\(|strictParsing|new Date\\(\" src/date_utils.ts src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-datepicker parseDate strictParsing native Date fallback" --limit 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'git log --oneline --all -- src/date_utils.ts | head -20 && git blame -L 296,326 src/date_utils.ts'
/bin/bash -lc 'git show c4bfeade -- src/date_utils.js | rg -n -C 12 "parseDate|new Date" | head -140'
/bin/bash -lc 'git show --stat --oneline f0d4c560c && git show f0d4c560c -- src/date_utils.js | rg -n -C 8 "parseDate|new Date" | head -100'

/bin/bash -lc "git show HEAD:src/test/date_utils_test.test.ts | sed -n '1080,1120p'; git show c4bfeade"'^:test/date_utils_test.js 2>/dev/null | rg -n -C 8 "locale w/o strict|26. feb|new Date'"\\(value\\)\" | head -100"
/bin/bash -lc "git show c4bfeade:src/date_utils.js | sed -n '70,115p'; git show c4bfeade:test/date_utils_test.js 2>/dev/null | rg -n -C 8 \"26. feb|locale w/o strict\" | head -100"
/bin/bash -lc "node -e 'for (const v of [\"26. feb 1995\",\"2025-12-16\",\"01/15/20\",\"invalid\"]) { const d=new Date(v); console.log(v,d.toString(),"'!Number.isNaN(d.getTime())) }'"'"
/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m search "react-datepicker strictParsing native parsing fallback parseDate" --limit 5'

/bin/bash -lc 'nmem --json m add "react-datepicker parseDate should try each configured date-fns format first and return the first valid format-based result. If no format matches, non-strict parsing (strictParsing=false) falls back to native new Date(value), while strict parsing returns null without native fallback. This preserves format precedence and restores flexible typed/pasted input such as ISO dates with an MM/dd/yyyy format." -t "parseDate non-strict native fallback" --unit-type decision -l label_react-datepicker -l label_date-parsing -s codex -i 0.8'
